title: おしごとシークレット 2話 彼氏でも出来た？

script.text: ――数週間後

translations.en: ――A few weeks later

script.text: はぁ、はぁ、はぁ……新曲の振り付け

translations.en: Pant‚ pant‚ pant… The choreography for the new song

script.text: 難易度高いけど、いい感じになってきたね！

translations.en: is really tough‚ but it's coming together nicely!

script.text: ええ。スケジュールはかなり押しているけど

translations.en: Yes. The schedule is pretty tight‚ but

script.text: なんとかフェスには間に合いそうで良かったわ

translations.en: it looks like we'll make it in time for the festival.

script.text: うんうん。せやな

translations.en: Yup‚ yup. That's right.

script.text: 振り付けを変えましょう！

translations.en: Let's change the choreography!

script.text: ……って瑠依ちゃんが言うた時は

translations.en: …is what Rui-chan said‚

script.text: そりゃもうびっくりしたけどな～

translations.en: and I was so surprised!

script.text: もう……悪かったわよ

translations.en: Oh… I'm sorry.

script.text: でも、せっかく大舞台を任せてもらえるんだもの

translations.en: But since we've been given such a big stage‚

script.text: 私達の努力で、少しでもいいものにしたいし

translations.en: we want to make it as good as we can with our effort.

script.text: 観に来てくれるみんなを喜ばせたいじゃない？

translations.en: We want to make everyone who comes to see us happy.

script.text: ふふ、瑠依ちゃんのそういうところ、うちは好きです

translations.en: Hehe‚ I like that about you‚ Rui-chan.

script.text: ……ふわぁ

translations.en: …Yawn.

script.text: 優ちゃん、最近あくびが多いね。寝不足？

translations.en: Yu-chan‚ you've been yawning a lot lately. Are you tired?

script.text: 私も気になってたの

translations.en: I've noticed too.

script.text: このところ疲れがとれてないみたいだけど……大丈夫？

translations.en: You seem to be really worn out lately… Are you okay?

script.text: へーき、へーき。全然気にせんといて

translations.en: I'm fine‚ I'm fine. Don't worry 'bout it.

script.text: 暑さのせいか、ちょっと寝つきが悪いだけやから

translations.en: It's just the hot weather making it hard to sleep.

script.text: 夏バテかな？　美味しい物食べて、スタミナつけよう！

translations.en: Maybe it's summer fatigue? Let's eat something good and get our energy up!

script.text: そろそろ晩ご飯の時間だし

translations.en: It's almost dinner time anyway.

script.text: そうね、三人で食べに行きましょう

translations.en: Right‚ let's all go out to eat together.

script.text: さくらにお勧めのとんかつ屋さんを教えてもらったの

translations.en: Sakura recommended a great tonkatsu place.

script.text: とんかつ！？　やったーっ！　瑠依ちゃんナイス！

translations.en: Tonkatsu!? Yay! Nice one‚ Rui-chan!

script.text: 楽しみだね、優ちゃん！！

translations.en: This will be fun‚ right‚ Yu-chan!?

script.text: ……今からかぁ

translations.en: …From now?

script.text: うーん……悪いんやけど、うち遠慮しとくわ

translations.en: Hmm… I'm sorry‚ but I'll skip this time.

script.text: 今日のところは二人で行ってきて？

translations.en: You two go ahead without me today‚ okay?

script.text: え～！？　優ちゃん

translations.en: What!? Yu-chan!

script.text: 最近、ちっとも私達に付き合ってくれない！

translations.en: Lately‚ you never hang out with us anymore!

script.text: もしかして、優の寝不足の原因ってフェスの準備で

translations.en: Could it be that Yu's lack of sleep is because of

script.text: 過密スケジュールになってるせい……？

translations.en: the festival preparations and the tight schedule…?

script.text: ……瑠依ちゃんに隠し事は出来んなぁ

translations.en: …Rui-chan‚ you know me too well.

script.text: 実はうち、大舞台を前にして、緊張しとるんよ

translations.en: Actually‚ I'm really nervous about the big stage.

script.text: それじゃ、緊張をほぐすためにも

translations.en: In that case‚ maybe you should

script.text: 私達と遊ぶのがいいんじゃないかな？

translations.en: hang out with us to relax!

script.text: ごめんな。このところ用事が重なっててな

translations.en: Sorry. I've had a lot of things going on lately.

script.text: 今日も親戚の法事があるんよ

translations.en: I have a family memorial service today too.

script.text: それ、こないだも言ってたよね。……本当？

translations.en: You said that last time too… Is it really true?

script.text: 本当の本当

translations.en: It's really true.

script.text: 本当の本当の本当？

translations.en: Really‚ really true?

script.text: 本当の本当の本当の本当……

translations.en: Really‚ really‚ really true…

script.text: っていつまで続くん！？　うちのこと疑い過ぎです

translations.en: How long are we gonna keep this up!? Y'all are doubting me too much.

script.text: 今度のフェスが終わる頃には一段落してるから

translations.en: Things will calm down after the festival.

script.text: そしたらいっぱい遊ぼう？　ほな、お先やで～

translations.en: Then we can hang out a lot. Well‚ see y'all later.

script.text: 行っちゃった……

translations.en: She left…

script.text: 最近、練習が終わったらすぐ一人で帰っちゃうよね

translations.en: Recently‚ she always goes home alone right after practice.

script.text: でもご親戚の法事なら仕方ないわ

translations.en: But if it's a family memorial service‚ it can't be helped.

script.text: 瑠依ちゃん……

translations.en: Rui-chan…

script.text: 親戚の法事はそんなに連続しないと思うよ？

translations.en: Family memorial services don't happen that often‚ right?

script.text: 違うの？

translations.en: Is that not it?

script.text: じゃあ、優が嘘をついてまで行く用事って……？

translations.en: Then‚ what kind of thing would Yu lie about to go to…?

script.text: なんだろうね……私も分からないけど……

translations.en: I wonder… I don't know either‚ but…

script.text: なんか最近様子がおかしい気がする

translations.en: Lately‚ she seems a bit strange.

script.text: わ、私達と遊ぶよりも大事な用事……？

translations.en: A more important thing than hanging out with us…?

script.text: 瑠依ちゃん？　どうかした？

translations.en: Rui-chan? What's wrong?

script.text: な、なんでもないわ

translations.en: N-nothing.

script.text: あっ、そうだ！

translations.en: Oh‚ I know!

script.text: 例えば……彼氏が出来た、とか？

translations.en: Maybe… A boyfriend?

script.text: ……か、彼氏！？　優に限ってそんなことは……

translations.en: B-boyfriend? Yu would never…

script.text: そうかな？　バレンタインの時も思ったんだけど

translations.en: Really? I thought the same on Valentine's Day.

script.text: 優ちゃん、私達が思ってるよりもずっと大人だよ？

translations.en: Yu-chan is much more mature than we think‚ right?

script.text: そ、そうよね……優は大人だもの

translations.en: Y-yeah… Yu is an adult.

script.text: キスの雰囲気についてとか。あの恋愛知識からすると

translations.en: With her knowledge about kissing and romance‚

script.text: 彼氏の一人や二人、いてもおかしくないと思う！

translations.en: it's not strange if she had a boyfriend or two!

script.text: 優に彼氏が二人……！？

translations.en: Yu having two boyfriends…?

script.text: そうね……大人……だもの……

translations.en: Yeah… she is an adult…

script.text: 瑠依ちゃんがいる限り

translations.en: I thought that as long as Rui-chan is here‚

script.text: 優ちゃんが彼氏を作ることはないと思ってたけど……

translations.en: Yu-chan wouldn't get a boyfriend‚ but…

script.text: 大人……だもの……

translations.en: She is an adult…

script.text: おーい、瑠依ちゃん？

translations.en: Hey‚ Rui-chan?

script.text: これ全部私達の妄想だよ？

translations.en: This is all our imagination‚ you know?

script.text: 私の声、聞こえてない……？

translations.en: Can you hear me…?

script.text: よしっ！　優ちゃんが何してるのかはっきりさせよう！

translations.en: Alright! Let's find out what Yu-chan is up to!

script.text: え……？　ちょっと引っ張らないで、すみれ

translations.en: Eh…? Don't pull me‚ Sumire.

script.text: まさか優を追いかけるつもり？

translations.en: Are you planning to follow Yu?

script.text: そうだよ！　ほら、レッツゴー！

translations.en: That's right! Let's go!

script.text: 瑠依ちゃん達、疑っとったな

translations.en: Rui-chan and them were suspicious‚ huh.

script.text: ……あはは、さすがに法事は無理があったなぁ

translations.en: …Haha‚ I guess the memorial service was too much.

script.text: ……お待たせ、ちょっと遅れてもうて、ごめんな

translations.en: …Sorry for the wait. I'm a bit late.

script.text: 気にしなくていい。それより仕事は大丈夫？

translations.en: Don't worry about it. Is work okay?

script.text: 今夜はやめてもいいんだよ

translations.en: You can skip tonight if you want.

script.text: いいえ、うちが好きでしてることやもん

translations.en: No‚ I want to do this.

script.text: ちゃんと仕事と両立させるから平気です

translations.en: I'll manage both work and this‚ so it's fine.

script.text: ……やっぱり親戚の方と会ってるんじゃない？

translations.en: …She is meeting with a relative‚ right?

script.text: 随分親しそうだし

translations.en: They seem really close.

script.text: そうかな？　……あっ、腕に手を回してる！

translations.en: Really? …Oh‚ she's putting her arm around him!

script.text: ただの親戚にしては、親し過ぎじゃない？

translations.en: They seem too close for just relatives‚ don't you think?

script.text: やっぱり彼氏じゃないかな……？

translations.en: Maybe he really is her boyfriend…?

script.text: ……どうしよう。私、これから優と

translations.en: …What should I do? I don't know

script.text: どう接したらいいのか、分からなくなってきた

translations.en: how to face Yu from now on.

script.text: お、落ち込まないで、瑠依ちゃん

translations.en: D-don't be down‚ Rui-chan.

script.text: とにかく、もう少し様子を見て――

translations.en: For now‚ let's just watch a bit longer――

script.text: 分かった。今夜も頑張ろう

translations.en: Got it. Let's do our best tonight.

script.text: うん、楽しみやな。パパ、上手やから

translations.en: Yeah‚ I'm looking forward to it. You're really good‚ Papa.

script.text: はは、おだてられると照れるな。さあ、部屋に行こう

translations.en: Haha‚ you flatter me. Let's go to the room.
…Papa?

script.text: 二人でホテルに入っちゃった……

translations.en: They went into the hotel together…

script.text: そんな……優ちゃんが、そんな……

translations.en: No way… Yu-chan‚ really…?
